notes: Authored a focused OpenAPI from the Go.Data API docs and the adaptor surface. Endpoint paths were confirmed from the adaptor's compiled source: list/get use GET with a stringified LoopBack `filter`, and upsert performs a GET lookup then POST (create) or PUT /{id} (update). Covers outbreaks, per-outbreak contacts and cases, locations, and reference-data. Resource schemas reflect Go.Data's LoopBack model (reference-data-coded enums, address/document sub-objects); many optional fields are omitted for focus. No single machine-readable OpenAPI file is published upstream (the docs site is HTML).
